display.purpose: Hero h1 only. One per page.

title.purpose: Card and feature h3s; sentence-case plan names.

body.purpose: Paragraphs, descriptions, list items. Cap 65-75ch on prose.

label.purpose: Tiny tracked UPPERCASE metadata only: stat labels, plan kickers, footer heads. Never buttons or eyebrows.

shadows.name: rest
shadows.purpose: Cards and containers at rest. Barely defines the edge.

shadows.name: hover
shadows.purpose: Cards/containers on hover, paired with a 2px lift.

shadows.name: raised
shadows.purpose: CTA panel and gallery lightbox only. The most elevation on the site.

shadows.name: primary-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary buttons only. A whisper of Mentor Blue under the fill.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default ease-out for state transitions and reveals.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Mobile menu expand, card lifts, FAQ open.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Mentor Blue fill, white semibold label, whisper of primary glow. The main conversion action.
components.html: Comenzar gratis
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 20px; background: var(--color-primary); color: #fff; font-family: var(--font-primary, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(38,124,209,0.20); transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-secondary); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.20), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.20); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-body), 0 0 0 4px var(--color-primary); } .ds-btn-icon { width: 18px; height: 18px; flex: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Transparent fill, hairline border, near-white label. The secondary action.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 20px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--color-border); color: var(--color-text-light); font-family: var(--font-primary, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--color-card); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-body), 0 0 0 4px var(--color-primary); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Surface fill, hairline border, 12px radius, ambient rest shadow. Lifts 2px and shifts border to Mentor Blue on hover.
components.html:
Chat con IA

Pregunta lo que quieras sobre razonamiento verbal, matemática o cualquier tema del examen.
components.css: .ds-card { position: relative; display: block; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; background: var(--color-card); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.10); transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.20), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.20); border-color: rgba(38,124,209,0.30); } .ds-card-icon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(38,124,209,0.10); color: var(--color-primary); } .ds-card-icon svg { width: 24px; height: 24px; } .ds-card-title { margin: 16px 0 0; font-family: var(--font-primary, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25; color: var(--color-text-light); } .ds-card-body { margin: 8px 0 0; font-family: var(--font-primary, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.625; color: var(--color-gray); }

components.name: Icon Badge
components.description: 48px Mentor-Blue-tinted square holding a Material Symbol. Reads as brand without spending the full accent.
components.css: .ds-icon-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(38,124,209,0.10); color: var(--color-primary); } .ds-icon-badge svg { width: 24px; height: 24px; }

components.name: Nav Header
components.description: Sticky 64px header, Ink/95 with structural backdrop-blur, hairline bottom border. Sentence-case items; active is Mentor Blue.
components.html:
UUbot
  • Inicio
  • Características
  • Precios
Comenzar gratis
components.css: .ds-header { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50; height: 64px; background: rgba(15,17,23,0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border); } .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 100%; max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 16px; } .ds-brand { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: var(--font-primary, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--color-text-light); text-decoration: none; } .ds-brand-mark { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--color-primary); color: #fff; font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-nav-list { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav-link { display: inline-block; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: var(--font-primary, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-gray); text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: var(--color-text-light); } .ds-nav-link.is-active { color: var(--color-primary); } .ds-nav-cta { padding: 8px 16px; font-size: 0.8125rem; }

components.name: FAQ Item
components.description: Native details/summary for a11y. Bordered circle + rotates 45deg to x and fills Mentor Blue when open.
components.html:
¿Realmente es gratis?
Sí, la esencia de Ubot es gratuita. Con tu cuenta básica tienes acceso a consultas diarias, exámenes cortos y participación en rankings, sin tarjeta de crédito.
components.css: .ds-faq { border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border); background: var(--color-body); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.10); transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-faq[open] { border-color: rgba(38,124,209,0.30); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.20), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.20); } .ds-faq-q { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; padding: 16px; cursor: pointer; list-style: none; font-family: var(--font-primary, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-text-light); } .ds-faq-q::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; } .ds-faq-icon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex: none; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border); background: var(--color-card); color: var(--color-gray); transition: transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), background 200ms, color 200ms, border-color 200ms; } .ds-faq-icon svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; } .ds-faq[open] .ds-faq-icon { transform: rotate(45deg); background: var(--color-primary); color: #fff; border-color: var(--color-primary); } .ds-faq-a { padding: 0 16px 16px; font-family: var(--font-primary, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.625; color: var(--color-gray); } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-faq, .ds-faq-icon { transition: none; } .ds-faq[open] .ds-faq-icon { transform: none; } }

components.name: Pricing Card
components.description: Two-plan pricing card. Highlighted (Premium) plan uses amber border + tint + Popular pill; colones primary, USD secondary.
components.html:
Ubot PremiumPopular
₡2.500/ mes

≈ $5 USD

  • Exámenes ilimitados y semanales exclusivos
  • Generación de videos explicativos
Obtener Premium
components.css: .ds-price { display: flex; flex-direction: column; border-radius: 16px; padding: 32px; background: var(--color-card); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.10); } .ds-price--highlight { border-color: rgba(245,158,11,0.50); background: rgba(245,158,11,0.05); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(245,158,11,0.10); } .ds-price-head { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-price-name { font-family: var(--font-primary, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.025em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--color-gray); } .ds-price-pill { border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 8px; background: #f59e0b; color: #fff; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-price-amount { margin-top: 16px; display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 4px; } .ds-price-currency { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--color-gray); } .ds-price-value { font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1; color: var(--color-text-light); } .ds-price-period { color: var(--color-gray); } .ds-price-sub { margin: 4px 0 0; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--color-gray); } .ds-price-feats { list-style: none; margin: 24px 0 0; padding: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; flex: 1; } .ds-price-feats li { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; font-family: var(--font-primary, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--color-text-light); } .ds-check { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex: none; width: 16px; height: 16px; margin-top: 2px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(34,197,94,0.15); color: #22c55e; } .ds-check svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; } .ds-price-cta { margin-top: 32px; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 6px; text-align: center; font-family: var(--font-primary, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; background: #f59e0b; color: #fff; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-price-cta:hover { background: #d97706; } .ds-price-cta:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--color-body), 0 0 0 4px #f59e0b; }

components.name: CTA Panel
components.description: Ink-to-Ink-Raised gradient, 16px radius, raised shadow, two Mentor-Blue/10 blur orbs. The one place decorative blur lives.
components.html:
¿Listo para entrar a la U?

Únete a Ubot hoy y empieza a prepararte con inteligencia artificial. Es gratis.

Comenzar gratis ahora
components.css: .ds-cta { position: relative; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 16px; padding: 56px 48px; text-align: center; background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--color-dark) 0%, var(--color-dark-gray) 100%); box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.30), 0 4px 6px -4px rgba(0,0,0,0.30); } .ds-cta-orb { position: absolute; width: 192px; height: 192px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(38,124,209,0.10); filter: blur(48px); pointer-events: none; } .ds-cta-orb--tr { top: -64px; right: -64px; } .ds-cta-orb--bl { bottom: -64px; left: -64px; } .ds-cta-title { position: relative; margin: 0; font-family: var(--font-primary, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: clamp(1.875rem, 4vw, 2.25rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.25; color: var(--color-text-light); } .ds-cta-body { position: relative; margin: 16px auto 0; max-width: 36ch; font-family: var(--font-primary, Inter, sans-serif); font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.625; color: var(--color-gray); } .ds-cta-btn { position: relative; margin-top: 32px; }

narrative.overview:
Ubot's surface is a practice arena, not a brochure. The dark ink is the practice floor — the room a student sits in at 11pm grinding timed exams. Mentor Blue is the coach's marker: the line on the whiteboard, the active rep, the streak counter. Everything else stays quiet so the marker reads. The system is refined and restrained; it earns trust through clarity and specificity (real universities, real exam formats, real prices in colones), never through spectacle. Hierarchy comes from weight, size, and a single accent — not from a second typeface or a gradient.

This system explicitly rejects the generic SaaS / AI-tool landing reflex (no indigo-to-violet gradient blobs, no glassmorphism cards, no hero-metric template, no identical icon-card grids), the dark-mode cliché / neon AI reflex (no dark-for-cool, no neon glow, no trendy AI aesthetic that trades legibility for mood), and stiff corporate / formal treatment (Ubot is a coach, not an institution).
keyCharacteristics: Dark, single-accent system: ink surface + one Mentor Blue marker + amber reserved exclusively for Premium.
Single typeface (Inter) carrying the entire hierarchy via weight and size; no second face.
Subtle-hybrid elevation: ambient shadows at rest, deepening only as a state response (hover/focus).
Sentence-case voice everywhere except tiny tracked metadata (stats, plan names, footer heads).
Refined and restrained: every shadow, border, and ornament earns its place or is removed.

rules.name: The One Marker Rule
rules.body: Mentor Blue appears on <=15% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point. If two large surfaces both want it, one is wrong — step one back to neutral or to Deeper Mentor Blue.

rules.name: The Premium Amber Rule
rules.body: Amber is a reserved signal, not a color choice. It appears only on Premium-specific affordances (the Premium feature tag, the highlighted pricing plan, the Popular badge). Using amber anywhere else dilutes the paid tier's visual currency.

rules.name: The AA Boundary Rule
rules.body: Mentor Blue sits at ~4.4:1 on Ink and ~3.9:1 on Surface as text; white-on-Mentor-Blue sits at ~4.3:1. Both are just under 4.5:1 AA for normal text. Use Mentor Blue as text only for large/bold text or non-text affordances; for small interactive fills use Deeper Mentor Blue (#1f61a3); keep primary button labels semibold.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: One typeface, Inter, in four weights (400/600/700/800). Introducing a second face is a departure from identity and requires an explicit trigger. Hierarchy comes from weight + size + color.

rules.name: The Sentence-Case Rule
rules.body: Buttons, nav items, section headings, and body copy are sentence-case. Uppercase tracked type is a metadata treatment, not a heading treatment — only on Label-class elements. An uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section is prohibited.

rules.name: The State-Response Rule
rules.body: Shadows deepen on hover and focus; they do not perform at rest. A card at rest has the Rest shadow; on interaction it lifts to Hover. Resting elements never carry Raised or glow shadows.

rules.name: The No-Neon Rule
rules.body: Colored shadows are limited to the single Primary glow on buttons. No neon drop-glow on cards, headings, or icons. If a glow would make the page read as 'AI tool,' it is prohibited.

dos: Do keep Mentor Blue to <=15% of any screen (The One Marker Rule); carry everything else in the Ink/Surface/Border neutral family.
Do use Deeper Mentor Blue (#1f61a3) for small interactive fills and keep primary button labels semibold (600) so contrast clears the AA boundary.
Do build hierarchy from Inter weight + size + the single Mentor Blue marker — never from a second typeface.
Do keep section headings sentence-case; reserve uppercase tracked type for Label-class metadata only.
Do let shadows respond to state: Rest at rest, Hover on hover/focus, Raised only for the CTA and lightbox.
Do show the product in action (real exam formats, the chat, the ranking, prices in colones) instead of asserting 'AI-powered.'
Do keep the page fast and usable before JavaScript runs; the audience is on mobile and slow connections.
donts: Don't use indigo-to-violet gradient blobs, glassmorphism cards, the hero-metric template, or endless identical icon-card grids — the generic SaaS / AI-tool landing anti-reference.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text over a gradient). The unused gradient-text-primary utility is a banned pattern and should be removed. Emphasis comes from weight or size.
Don't use neon glow, dark-for-cool mood, or trendy AI aesthetics that trade legibility for vibe — the dark-mode cliché / neon AI anti-reference.
Don't use stiff corporate formality, university-brochure earnestness, or stock-photo stiffness — the stiff corporate / formal anti-reference.
Don't put a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section, or numbered 01/02/03 markers as default scaffolding.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored side-stripe accent.
Don't use amber outside Premium-specific affordances, or Success green outside pricing checkmarks.
Don't apply backdrop-blur to card bodies (glassmorphism). The sticky header's blur is the only exception and is structural.
Don't let heading copy overflow its container at narrow breakpoints — reduce the clamp max or rewrite the copy.
